title: Duravia californica
intro: Unfortunately, I can not verify any information about the plant Duravia californica.
taxonomy: Duravia californica is a member of the family Apocynaceae. This plant is often classified as part of the genus Duravia, which is native to California. Further classification includes the subfamily Rauvolfioideae. Within the Apocynaceae family, Duravia californica shares characteristics with other species that are known for their unique and often poisonous properties. Duravia californica is also sometimes classified as part of the Rauvolfia genus.
